TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqCon-dialog4_robo_bakan_ape 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: uxe cbeyo a ita wa meepah meepahta klaali kesaota ho.
S.PHON: uxe ʦbejo a ita wa meepaħ meepaħta klaali kesaota ħo.
S.FORM: uxe cbeyo a ita wa meepah meepahta klaali kesaota ho.
S.PHON: uxe ʦbejo a ita wa meepaħ meepaħta klaali kesaota ħo.
S.TRANSL: 不是...我們以前工作.我們來跟他說我們以前每天工作.
No...we worked in the past. Let's tell him we used to work every day.

S.FORM: a cbeyo na.
S.PHON: a ʦbejo na.
S.FORM: a cbeyo na.
S.PHON: a ʦbejo na.
S.TRANSL: 過去的時候.
In the past.

S.FORM: XXXX cbeyo a meepahta klaali ita na a inita gduru ma.
S.PHON: xxxx ʦbejo a meepaħta klaali ita na a inita gduɾu ma.
S.FORM: XXXX cbeyo a meepahta klaali ita na a inita gduru ma.
S.PHON: xxxx ʦbejo a meepaħta klaali ita na a inita gduɾu ma.
S.TRANSL: 從前我們每天工作,而且我們不休息.
In the past, we worked every day, and we did not take a rest.

S.FORM: ma musata meepah kika pneyahta neepah dungan ma mapata qhuni.
S.PHON: ma musata meepaħ kika pnejaħta neepaħ duŋan ma mapata qħuni.
S.FORM: ma musata meepah kika pneyahta neepah dungan ma mapata qhuni.
S.PHON: ma musata meepaħ kika pnejaħta neepaħ duŋan ma mapata qħuni.
S.TRANSL: 而且我們去工作,回來的時候,我們又背木材.
And we went to work. On our way back, we carried woods on our back.

S.FORM: te mapata laqi uri apaanun hiya ka laqi apaanun bobo qhuni ka laqi.
S.PHON: te mapata laqi uɾi apaanun ħija ka laqi apaanun bobo qħuni ka laqi.
S.FORM: te mapata laqi uri apaanun hiya ka laqi apaanun bobo qhuni ka laqi.
S.PHON: te mapata laqi uɾi apaanun ħija ka laqi apaanun bobo qħuni ka laqi.
S.TRANSL: 我們還要背小孩,小孩背在那裡,在木材上.
We carried children on our back as well, carrying children there on the woord

S.FORM: e meyahta sapah dungan mtahuta puniq.
S.PHON: e mejaħta sapaħ duŋan mtaħuta puniq.
S.FORM: e meyahta sapah dungan mtahuta puniq.
S.PHON: e mejaħta sapaħ duŋan mtaħuta puniq.
S.TRANSL: 我們回家,又要生火.
We came home and we made fire.

S.FORM: pureta oyu pureta ido t a trimata laqi.
S.PHON: puɾeta oju puɾeta ido t a tɾimata laqi.
S.FORM: pureta oyu pureta ido t a trimata laqi.
S.PHON: puɾeta oju puɾeta ido t a tɾimata laqi.

TRANSL.notes: (然後)我們煮洗澡水和煮飯.我們給小孩洗澡.

S.TRANSL: 我們煮洗澡水和煮飯.我們給小孩洗澡.
And then we boil water and cooked rice. We bathed the children.

S.FORM: na un ma kika laqi ma taqita kika uqulun ido laqi han ma kika taqi bobona.
S.PHON: na un ma kika laqi ma taqita kika uqulun ido laqi ħan ma kika taqi bobona.
S.FORM: na un ma kika laqi ma taqita kika uqulun ido laqi han ma kika taqi bobona.
S.PHON: na un ma kika laqi ma taqita kika uqulun ido laqi ħan ma kika taqi bobona.
S.TRANSL: 是這樣,小孩去睡覺,之前,我們給小孩子餵飯.然後小孩睡覺.
Yes, children went to sleep, and before that we fed children first. Then children slept.

S.FORM: so kiya ka kurusi so kiya a so kiya ka ndaannami cbeyo.
S.PHON: so kija ka kuɾusi so kija a so kija ka ndaannami ʦbejo.
S.FORM: so kiya ka kurusi so kiya a so kiya ka ndaannami cbeyo.
S.PHON: so kija ka kuɾusi so kija a so kija ka ndaannami ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 就是像那樣辛苦.那就是從前的經歷.
It was like that hard. That was our experience in the past.

S.FORM: X henu han robo.
S.PHON: x ħenu ħan ɾobo.
S.FORM: X henu han robo.
S.PHON: x ħenu ħan ɾobo.
S.TRANSL: Robo,那件事.
Robo, that thing.

S.FORM: kiya a henu han robo mssbaruxta klaali han ma.
S.PHON: kija a ħenu ħan ɾobo mssbaɾuxta klaali ħan ma.
S.FORM: kiya a henu han robo mssbaruxta klaali han ma.
S.PHON: kija a ħenu ħan ɾobo mssbaɾuxta klaali ħan ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們以前常常會交換工作.
We often exchanged labors in the past.

S.FORM: un kiya kiya a msbaruxta klaali qnburung kosuy han.
S.PHON: un kija kija a msbaɾuxta klaali qnbuɾuŋ kosuj ħan.
S.FORM: un kiya kiya a msbaruxta klaali qnburung kosuy han.
S.PHON: un kija kija a msbaɾuxta klaali qnbuɾuŋ kosuj ħan.
S.TRANSL: 我們常常割香茅草還工.
We often sheared lemon grass in return.

S.FORM: un a musata kn a kika smbarux hbaro seediq qnburung kosuy ma.
S.PHON: un a musata kn a kika smbaɾux ħbaɾo seediq qnbuɾuŋ kosuj ma.
S.FORM: un a musata kn a kika smbarux hbaro seediq qnburung kosuy ma.
S.PHON: un a musata kn a kika smbaɾux ħbaɾo seediq qnbuɾuŋ kosuj ma.
S.TRANSL: 很多人互相幫忙收割香茅草.
Many people helped each other shear lemon grass.

S.FORM: akedu bale a mata dekiru ciida robo ha kteetu a.
S.PHON: akedu bale a mata dekiɾu ʦiida ɾobo ħa kteetu a.
S.FORM: akedu bale a mata dekiru ciida robo ha kteetu a.
S.PHON: akedu bale a mata dekiɾu ʦiida ɾobo ħa kteetu a.
S.TRANSL: Robo,我們那時候怎麼能那樣?
Robo, how could we do that at that time?

S.FORM: un kiya han mkesa ini taapa rulu uri naqah elu duri ma.
S.PHON: un kija ħan mkesa ini taapa ɾulu uɾi naqaħ elu duɾi ma.
S.FORM: un kiya han mkesa ini taapa rulu uri naqah elu duri ma.
S.PHON: un kija ħan mkesa ini taapa ɾulu uɾi naqaħ elu duɾi ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們走上坡路.我們沒辦法搭車,路又很糟.
We walked on slopes. We could not take a car, and the road was lousy.

S.FORM: a ma uxe bale kangtang kiya di a.
S.PHON: a ma uxe bale kaŋtaŋ kija di a.
S.FORM: a ma uxe bale kangtang kiya di a.
S.PHON: a ma uxe bale kaŋtaŋ kija di a.
S.TRANSL: 那真的不簡單.
That was really not easy.

S.FORM: ukata kucu duri cbeyo a.
S.PHON: ukata kuʦu duɾi ʦbejo a.
S.FORM: ukata kucu duri cbeyo a.
S.PHON: ukata kuʦu duɾi ʦbejo a.
S.TRANSL: 以前也沒有鞋子.
There were no shoes in the past, either

S.FORM: musa a meepah na hadasi hadasi na hadasi duri.
S.PHON: musa a meepaħ na ħadasi ħadasi na ħadasi duɾi.
S.FORM: musa a meepah na hadasi hadasi na hadasi duri.
S.PHON: musa a meepaħ na ħadasi ħadasi na ħadasi duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我們赤腳去工作.
We went to work barefoot.

S.FORM: cbeyo riyung kii han na.
S.PHON: ʦbejo ɾijuŋ kii ħan na.
S.FORM: cbeyo riyung kii han na.
S.PHON: ʦbejo ɾijuŋ kii ħan na.
S.TRANSL: 那是更早以前.
That was even farther in the past.

S.FORM: un ma wano kosuy tikuh a henu han bobona de kika mhumata kesaba di ma.
S.PHON: un ma wano kosuj tikuħ a ħenu ħan bobona de kika mħumata kesaba di ma.
S.FORM: un ma wano kosuy tikuh a henu han bobona de kika mhumata kesaba di ma.
S.PHON: un ma wano kosuj tikuħ a ħenu ħan bobona de kika mħumata kesaba di ma.
S.TRANSL: 只有香茅草一點點那個,所以之後我們就種木薯.
Only lemon grass was a little..., so we grew cassavas afterwards.

S.FORM: un kesaba uhinta tikuh cikau laqi de i bale ba kesaba ninenkang na.
S.PHON: un kesaba uħinta tikuħ ʦikau laqi de i bale ba kesaba ninenkaŋ na.
S.FORM: un kesaba uhinta tikuh cikau laqi de i bale ba kesaba ninenkang na.
S.PHON: un kesaba uħinta tikuħ ʦikau laqi de i bale ba kesaba ninenkaŋ na.
S.TRANSL: 為了孩子的花費,我們努力工作.木薯每兩年才收成一次.
We worked as hard as possible so as to earn children's allowance. We could only harvest cassavas once in two years.

S.FORM: un ga inu ukata naq pila di ma ha tame na laqi gako di ma ppuuyas laqi do.
S.PHON: un ga inu ukata naq pila di ma ħa tame na laqi gako di ma ppuujas laqi do.
S.FORM: un ga inu ukata naq pila di ma ha tame na laqi gako di ma ppuuyas laqi do.
S.PHON: un ga inu ukata naq pila di ma ħa tame na laqi gako di ma ppuujas laqi do.
S.TRANSL: 讓孩子念書.
Let children study.

S.FORM: wadata kariun icineng bale di na.
S.PHON: wadata kaɾiun iʦineŋ bale di na.
S.FORM: wadata kariun icineng bale di na.
S.PHON: wadata kaɾiun iʦineŋ bale di na.
S.TRANSL: 真的我們沒有錢.為了讓小孩去學校讀書,我們一年就挖了.

TRANSL.notes: We really had no money. To let children study at school, we dug (the cassavas) in only one year.

S.TRANSL: We really had no money. To let children study at school, we dug in only one year.

S.FORM: musata um kurusi kmari kesaba na.
S.PHON: musata um kuɾusi kmaɾi kesaba na.
S.FORM: musata um kurusi kmari kesaba na.
S.PHON: musata um kuɾusi kmaɾi kesaba na.
S.TRANSL: 挖木薯很辛苦.
Digging cassavas was toilsome.

S.FORM: un mata kariunta kesaba ma kika phidounta han ma kika kika kika baruyunna cusacu laqi cusacu laqi na.
S.PHON: un mata kaɾiunta kesaba ma kika pħidounta ħan ma kika kika kika baɾujunna ʦusaʦu laqi ʦusaʦu laqi na.
S.FORM: un mata kariunta kesaba ma kika phidounta han ma kika kika kika baruyunna cusacu laqi cusacu laqi na.
S.PHON: un mata kaɾiunta kesaba ma kika pħidounta ħan ma kika kika kika baɾujunna ʦusaʦu laqi ʦusaʦu laqi na.
S.TRANSL: 是,我們挖木薯,然後先曬乾.然後賣掉讓小孩學校註冊.
Yes, we dug cassavas and then sun-dried them first. And sold them to register children at school.

S.FORM: un a muhinta han ukata naq a un km L2JmaemotteL2Jta kmbarux han duri ma.
S.PHON: un a muħinta ħan ukata naq a un km l**maemottel**ta kmbaɾux ħan duɾi ma.
S.FORM: un a muhinta han ukata naq a un km L2JmaemotteL2Jta kmbarux han duri ma.
S.PHON: un a muħinta ħan ukata naq a un km l**maemottel**ta kmbaɾux ħan duɾi ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們很努力.我們沒有,我們先借.
We made effort. We didn't have and we borrowed it in advance.

S.FORM: wata hmuwa suku ciida ha.
S.PHON: wata ħmuwa suku ʦiida ħa.
S.FORM: wata hmuwa suku ciida ha.
S.PHON: wata ħmuwa suku ʦiida ħa.
S.TRANSL: 我們當時怎麼能那樣生活?
How could we live that way at that time?

S.FORM: lngelungunmu duri we ini asi maanu cbeyo duri msbaruxta ma lngelungun saya.
S.PHON: lŋeluŋunmu duɾi we ini asi maanu ʦbejo duɾi msbaɾuxta ma lŋeluŋun saja.
S.FORM: lngelungunmu duri we ini asi maanu cbeyo duri msbaruxta ma lngelungun saya.
S.PHON: lŋeluŋunmu duɾi we ini asi maanu ʦbejo duɾi msbaɾuxta ma lŋeluŋun saja.
S.TRANSL: 我現在想起來.
Now I think.

S.FORM: inita bari siyang uri wano naq qcurux mremun mremun uqiun na masu ini bari siyang di.
S.PHON: inita baɾi sijaŋ uɾi wano naq qʦuɾux mɾemun mɾemun uqiun na masu ini baɾi sijaŋ di.
S.FORM: inita bari siyang uri wano naq qcurux mremun mremun uqiun na masu ini bari siyang di.
S.PHON: inita baɾi sijaŋ uɾi wano naq qʦuɾux mɾemun mɾemun uqiun na masu ini baɾi sijaŋ di.
S.TRANSL: 我現在想:「我們以前怎麼回事?」我們換工,也不買豬肉,只吃鹹魚.為什麼你不買豬肉?
Now I think, "What was wrong in the past?" We exchanged labors. We did not buy pork and only ate salty fish. Why didn't you buy pork?

S.FORM: qcurux mremun uqiun nanaq ma.
S.PHON: qʦuɾux mɾemun uqiun nanaq ma.
S.FORM: qcurux mremun uqiun nanaq ma.
S.PHON: qʦuɾux mɾemun uqiun nanaq ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們只有吃鹹魚.
We only ate salty fish.

S.FORM: iniku maanu maanu di ini kela ini kela mekan siyang na cbeyo.
S.PHON: iniku maanu maanu di ini kela ini kela mekan sijaŋ na ʦbejo.
S.FORM: iniku maanu maanu di ini kela ini kela mekan siyang na cbeyo.
S.PHON: iniku maanu maanu di ini kela ini kela mekan sijaŋ na ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 我們以前不知道要吃豬肉.
We could not buy pork in the past.

S.FORM: kuromane na inita bari siyang.
S.PHON: kuɾomane na inita baɾi sijaŋ.
S.FORM: kuromane na inita bari siyang.
S.PHON: kuɾomane na inita baɾi sijaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我們之前不買豬肉.
We did not buy pork before.

S.FORM: mesa tumun kuromame.
S.PHON: mesa tumun kuɾomame.
S.FORM: mesa tumun kuromame.
S.PHON: mesa tumun kuɾomame.
S.TRANSL: Tumun說我們就像豆豉.
Tumun said we were like fermented soy beans.

S.FORM: dqeras gaga kelaunmu ini ekan siyang si tumun baisurin ado kmukan heya na.
S.PHON: dqeɾas gaga kelaunmu ini ekan sijaŋ si tumun baisuɾin ado kmukan ħeja na.
S.FORM: dqeras gaga kelaunmu ini ekan siyang si tumun baisurin ado kmukan heya na.
S.PHON: dqeɾas gaga kelaunmu ini ekan sijaŋ si tumun baisuɾin ado kmukan ħeja na.
S.TRANSL: Baisurin的Tumun說:「我知道沒吃豬肉的人.」因為他自己是閩南人.
Tumun, who was from Baisurin, said, "I know who does not eat pork," because he was Southern Min.

S.FORM: a msresung dqeras hari hayan ini ekan siyang di.
S.PHON: a msɾesuŋ dqeɾas ħaɾi ħajan ini ekan sijaŋ di.
S.FORM: a msresung dqeras hari hayan ini ekan siyang di.
S.PHON: a msɾesuŋ dqeɾas ħaɾi ħajan ini ekan sijaŋ di.
S.TRANSL: 如果你沒吃豬肉,臉會乾癟.
If you don't eat pork, the face will be shriveled.

S.FORM: yamu seediq a ma a dqeras mndengu di ini ekan siyang kesai ya na tumun na.
S.PHON: jamu seediq a ma a dqeɾas mndeŋu di ini ekan sijaŋ kesai ja na tumun na.
S.FORM: yamu seediq a ma a dqeras mndengu di ini ekan siyang kesai ya na tumun na.
S.PHON: jamu seediq a ma a dqeɾas mndeŋu di ini ekan sijaŋ kesai ja na tumun na.
S.TRANSL: 「你們賽德克人不吃豬肉,所以臉很乾.」Tumun說.
"You Seediq people's face is dry, because you do not eat pork," Tumun said.

S.FORM: a a un bale ba ini ekan siyang han.
S.PHON: a a un bale ba ini ekan sijaŋ ħan.
S.FORM: a a un bale ba ini ekan siyang han.
S.PHON: a a un bale ba ini ekan sijaŋ ħan.
S.TRANSL: 真的,沒吃豬肉的臉就乾乾的.
That's true. The faces of those who did not eat pork were dry.

S.FORM: ini kela mari siyang cbeyo maanu kana ke.
S.PHON: ini kela maɾi sijaŋ ʦbejo maanu kana ke.
S.FORM: ini kela mari siyang cbeyo maanu kana ke.
S.PHON: ini kela maɾi sijaŋ ʦbejo maanu kana ke.
S.TRANSL: 我們從前不知道要買豬肉.
We did not know to buy pork.

S.FORM: kiya ka kiya ka X kerung tikuh han haan psbegu duri ma.
S.PHON: kija ka kija ka x keɾuŋ tikuħ ħan ħaan psbegu duɾi ma.
S.FORM: kiya ka kiya ka X kerung tikuh han haan psbegu duri ma.
S.PHON: kija ka kija ka x keɾuŋ tikuħ ħan ħaan psbegu duɾi ma.
S.TRANSL: 我們只好拿佛手柑煮湯.
We could only cook soup with chayote.

S.FORM: sama bale sama bale maanu qcurux mremun ma qcurux mremun psbegu na.
S.PHON: sama bale sama bale maanu qʦuɾux mɾemun ma qʦuɾux mɾemun psbegu na.
S.FORM: sama bale sama bale maanu qcurux mremun ma qcurux mremun psbegu na.
S.PHON: sama bale sama bale maanu qʦuɾux mɾemun ma qʦuɾux mɾemun psbegu na.
S.TRANSL: 我們用山萵苣和鹹魚煮湯.
We used wild lettuce and salty fish to cook soup.

S.FORM: saya de i i ini puqi qcurux mremun saya da taq naqah qitaan di na.
S.PHON: saja de i i ini puqi qʦuɾux mɾemun saja da taq naqaħ qitaan di na.
S.FORM: saya de i i ini puqi qcurux mremun saya da taq naqah qitaan di na.
S.PHON: saja de i i ini puqi qʦuɾux mɾemun saja da taq naqaħ qitaan di na.
S.TRANSL: 現在的人就不吃鹹魚.被看到不好.
People do not eat salty fish nowadays. It's not good to look at.

S.FORM: kii kesaun maku a anaq so kiya mbeyaxta riyung peni robo ani ini ekan abura na.
S.PHON: kii kesaun maku a anaq so kija mbejaxta ɾijuŋ peni ɾobo ani ini ekan abuɾa na.
S.FORM: kii kesaun maku a anaq so kiya mbeyaxta riyung peni robo ani ini ekan abura na.
S.PHON: kii kesaun maku a anaq so kija mbejaxta ɾijuŋ peni ɾobo ani ini ekan abuɾa na.
S.TRANSL: 我認為,Robo,雖然我們不吃油,但還是很有力量.
I think, Robo, although we did not eat oil, we were still strong.

S.FORM: so kiya un un so kiya un ani naq aburamiyan mnanang riyung na uka mekan siyang uka mnarux cbeyo.
S.PHON: so kija un un so kija un ani naq abuɾamijan mnanaŋ ɾijuŋ na uka mekan sijaŋ uka mnaɾux ʦbejo.
S.FORM: so kiya un un so kiya un ani naq aburamiyan mnanang riyung na uka mekan siyang uka mnarux cbeyo.
S.PHON: so kija un un so kija un ani naq abuɾamijan mnanaŋ ɾijuŋ na uka mekan sijaŋ uka mnaɾux ʦbejo.
S.TRANSL: 就算我們沒吃油,但還是很強壯,也沒生病.
Even though we did not eat oil, we were still very strong and we did not get sick.

S.FORM: ini ma uka ka ukata mesa imaheta sino bbiyan duri ciida un uka uka mimah sino.
S.PHON: ini ma uka ka ukata mesa imaħeta sino bbijan duɾi ʦiida un uka uka mimaħ sino.
S.FORM: ini ma uka ka ukata mesa imaheta sino bbiyan duri ciida un uka uka mimah sino.
S.PHON: ini ma uka ka ukata mesa imaħeta sino bbijan duɾi ʦiida un uka uka mimaħ sino.
S.TRANSL: 那時候,我們也沒有人到傍晚就說「我們來喝酒吧!」
At that time, there was not anybody among us who said in the evening, "Let's drink wine!"

S.FORM: hmuwa ka saya di.
S.PHON: ħmuwa ka saja di.
S.FORM: hmuwa ka saya di.
S.PHON: ħmuwa ka saja di.
S.TRANSL: 現在怎麼變成這樣.
What happened today?

S.FORM: bbiyan a maha mrebu mimah ipong wesupi iping imaheta han qtalang dara mesa un ptalang dara.
S.PHON: bbijan a maħa mɾebu mimaħ ipoŋ wesupi ipiŋ imaħeta ħan qtalaŋ daɾa mesa un ptalaŋ daɾa.
S.FORM: bbiyan a maha mrebu mimah ipong wesupi iping imaheta han qtalang dara mesa un ptalang dara.
S.PHON: bbijan a maħa mɾebu mimaħ ipoŋ wesupi ipiŋ imaħeta ħan qtalaŋ daɾa mesa un ptalaŋ daɾa.
S.TRANSL: 早上我們要去先喝一瓶維士比,說:「我們來喝一瓶促進血液循環.」
In the morning, we go drink a bottle of whisbih, saying "Let's drink a bottle to circulate blood."

S.FORM: bbiyan kiya ka mimah ipong dungan ptalang dara na mbeyah meepah si.
S.PHON: bbijan kija ka mimaħ ipoŋ duŋan ptalaŋ daɾa na mbejaħ meepaħ si.
S.FORM: bbiyan kiya ka mimah ipong dungan ptalang dara na mbeyah meepah si.
S.PHON: bbijan kija ka mimaħ ipoŋ duŋan ptalaŋ daɾa na mbejaħ meepaħ si.
S.TRANSL: 黃昏又喝一罐,說促進血液循環.
In the evening, we drink one bottle again saying that this circulates the blood.

S.FORM: un kiya ye kiya dungus na ho ima naq mkela.
S.PHON: un kija je kija duŋus na ħo ima naq mkela.
S.FORM: un kiya ye kiya dungus na ho ima naq mkela.
S.PHON: un kija je kija duŋus na ħo ima naq mkela.
S.TRANSL: 那是它的目的嗎?誰知道.
Is that the purpose? Who knows.

S.FORM: kiya kiya ka dungusna han.
S.PHON: kija kija ka duŋusna ħan.
S.FORM: kiya kiya ka dungusna han.
S.PHON: kija kija ka duŋusna ħan.
S.TRANSL: 這件事的目的就是那樣.
That is the purpose of this thing.

S.FORM: mama jiang yici dakissu dakissu sa.
S.PHON: mama jiaŋ jiʦi dakissu dakissu sa.
S.FORM: mama jiang yici dakissu dakissu sa.
S.PHON: mama jiaŋ jiʦi dakissu dakissu sa.
S.TRANSL: 她說你的Dakis.
She said your Dakis.

S.FORM: dakismu m dakismu thei kari.
S.PHON: dakismu m dakismu tħei kaɾi.
S.FORM: dakismu m dakismu thei kari.
S.PHON: dakismu m dakismu tħei kaɾi.
S.TRANSL: 我的Dakis很聽話.
My Dakis listens to my words.

S.FORM: malu riyung malu riyung malu riyung ciida ciida biciq ciida na biciq ciida na dooyungmu curi na mhulis riyung.
S.PHON: malu ɾijuŋ malu ɾijuŋ malu ɾijuŋ ʦiida ʦiida biʦiq ʦiida na biʦiq ʦiida na doojuŋmu ʦuɾi na mħulis ɾijuŋ.
S.FORM: malu riyung malu riyung malu riyung ciida ciida biciq ciida na biciq ciida na dooyungmu curi na mhulis riyung.
S.PHON: malu ɾijuŋ malu ɾijuŋ malu ɾijuŋ ʦiida ʦiida biʦiq ʦiida na biʦiq ʦiida na doojuŋmu ʦuɾi na mħulis ɾijuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他小時候,我抓他的小雞雞,他笑得很開心.
When he was little, I grabbed his penis, and he was laughing happily.
